<?php /** * League.Uri (https://uri.thephpleague.com) * * (c) Ignace Nyamagana Butera <nyamsprod@gmail.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ declare(strict_types=1); namespace League\Uri\Contracts; interface Conditionable { /** * Apply the callback if the given "condition" is (or resolves to) true. * * @param (callable(static): bool)|bool $condition * @param callable(static): (static|null) $onSuccess * @param ?callable(static): (static|null) $onFail */ public function when(callable|bool $condition, callable $onSuccess, ?callable $onFail = null): static; }
